steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies (per task.json) and run verify_task_dependencies.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure and library asset subfolder.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Read Xiong2024 paper summary to ground prompt template and threshold default.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no live external info needed; Xiong2024 summary covers protocol.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: only needs t0007 TRAJECTORY_RECORD_FIELDS schema, already known and documented.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design API surface, prompt template, parser, and test matrix.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: deterministic local tests, no remote compute.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement calibration.py, paths.py, constants.py, tests, and the library asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were created.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task; no out-of-the-box analysis required.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task; no quantitative results to compare.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions: ECE computation, provider-specific calibration variants.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed.
